themes.name: Overall App Experience
themes.description: Many users express high satisfaction with the app, finding it very good, secure, easy to use, and a great platform for investing and trading.

themes.name: External Fund Tracking
themes.description: Users are consistently frustrated by the inability to track or refresh their external mutual fund holdings, as this crucial feature is frequently paused or not working.
